title: Wholesome Turkish Foie Gras Omelette
description: A light, cultured Turkish omelette with gooey foie gras, served after an ice-bath shock for a refreshing start.
instructions: Place the diced foie gras in a bowl of ice water and let it chill for 15 minutes.
Remove the foie gras from the ice bath and pat it dry with a paper towel.
Melt butter and olive oil in a medium skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the diced tomato and smoked paprika, and cook until the tomato softens, about 2 minutes.
Whisk the eggs in a bowl, then pour them into the skillet and gently stir to form soft curds.
Fold in the chilled foie gras, allowing it to melt into the eggs just before they set.
Season with salt, pepper, parsley, and dill, and cook until the omelette is set but still moist, about 5 minutes.
Transfer to a plate and drizzle with a little extra olive oil for shine.
Serve immediately, ideally with a fresh green salad to complete the sattvic-friendly meal.
